frontmatter.title: Cursor Changelog（2026-06 节选）
frontmatter.description: Cursor 2026-06 发布动态：Bugbot / Composer 2.5 / Canvas / Design Mode / Enterprise / SDK / Shared Canvases
frontmatter.mirror_url: https://docs.cursor.com（原 docs SPA 不可 curl，已 fallback 到 changelog 静态页）
frontmatter.tier_group: MCP 生态 + 同类工具
frontmatter.notes: subagent v3：主 Claude pre-seed changelog（v1 SPA 失败 / v2 API 429）；原 cursor.com/docs 是 SPA，本源用 cursor.com/changelog 替代

cross_check_anchors.verbatim: The average review time for Bugbot is now ~90 seconds, down from ~5 minutes.
Select and annotate UI elements directly in a canvas to guide Cursor's edits
An organization is the top-level container for your company's identity, administration, and membership
You can now hand the local agent your own tools by passing function definitions through local.customTools
View your team's shared canvases in the Cursor Dashboard with read-only access

audience_judgment_basis: cs_background=yes 因 Cursor 面向工程师，受众熟读 SDK / MCP / IDE 扩展；devops=mid 因 SDK customTools / JSONL store / Enterprise IDP 涉及 CI 但非深 K8s；cc_experience=used 因对比价值需要已用过 CC
fetched_via_log: pre-seeded cache; cat-only, no network; mirror_url 标注因 cursor.com/docs SPA 替代到 changelog
exposed_problems: P19 复发：subagent 不严格遵循 audience enum 白名单（即使 prompt 列了全部值）；prompt 内强调「不接受自由发挥」不够，需要 LLM 外层 assertion 拦截
_validation_issues_at_subagent_return: P19 严重: audience_tags 全部不在 enum — 改 cs_background intermediate→yes / devops useful→mid / cc_experience useful_for_comparison→used
P23: body 含 HTML entity > 需 unescape
P21: subagent 自报 char_count 1342 偏低，body 实际 4000+ char（9 takeaway + 6 对比 + 锚点 20 行）；主 Claude 落盘时实测 wc -m 后修正
P19/P23 再次印证: subagent 自报 「strict」「no HTML entities」全不可信，必须主 Claude assertion 拦截
